items.title: Canada formally requests renewal of North American free trade pact
items.dek: In a letter to his North American counterparts, US-Canada Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc said the three countries should renew the USMCA trade deal.
items.body: In a letter to his North American counterparts, US-Canada Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc said the three countries should renew the USMCA trade deal.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal, family says
items.dek: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.
items.body: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Africa police investigate killing of two Mozambican men
items.dek: The deaths come after a day of violent protests against illegal migration in the town of Mossel Bay.
items.body: The deaths come after a day of violent protests against illegal migration in the town of Mossel Bay.
items.author: IriLine Desk
